title: PARADOX III: DYSYNCHRONY
fullPrompt:
Create a Hollywood-grade sci-fi thriller movie poster for the third installment in the PARADOX series.
This chapter explores the dysynchrony of time — moments desynchronized from one another, where the past, present, and future coexist but never align.
The poster centers on the main protagonist, now mentally and physically fractured by years of temporal instability. He (attached photo) stands in the middle of a city where time runs at different speeds in each block — one building frozen in daylight, another burning in dusk, another dissolving into ash as if centuries have passed. The skyline appears layered, temporal echoes overlapping, forming an impossible horizon of mixed realities.
Around him, faint afterimages of himself appear, each caught in different emotional states — one running, one screaming, one turning to dust. These translucent versions of him slightly lag or advance in motion, symbolizing his existence across fragmented seconds.His body flickers with faint energy distortions, as if he’s phasing between timelines.
Above, the sky fractures like glass — shards of time floating, reflecting alternate realities. Inside each shard, glimpses of different worlds appear: one peaceful, one dystopian, one completely empty. Lightning arcs between them, carrying glowing clock fragments suspended mid-air. The lighting is surreal and cold, blending cyan and gold hues to represent the clash between frozen and acceleratedThe color palette shifts between deep blues, steel grays, and pale amber — a contrast between stillness and motion. The composition should feel off-balance and chaotic, mirroring the theme of dysynchrony. The hero’s shadow doesn’t match his posture, hinting that even his timeline is unsynced from his own reality.
Main title in the lower third:
> PARADOX III: DYSYNCHRONY
Font style: Futura Bold or Orbitron, metallic silver-gray with fragmented edges as if splitting in time. ronyjunaidi
29/10/2025


The “III” subtly forms three glowing lines intersecting the infinity symbol (∞) from the previous logo — showing time’s complete breakdown.

Top: “REALITY ISN’T BROKEN.”
Bottom: “IT’S OUT OF TIME.”
